productDisplayName: Nike Women As Miler Ss White T-Shirts
description: Composition White t-shirt made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit fabric, has a mesh crew-neck and side panels, a reflective loop at the upper back, and flat seams Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Expert ventilation gives her the edge in the nike Miler girls' running t-shirt - a lightweight design that keeps sweat at bay as she's picking up speed. Pair it with Dri-Fit bottoms to perform at your best. The reflective loop at the back helps keep media plaayer cords out of the way, while the flat seams avoid chaffing, making your sporting experience comfortable and wonderful.
